pr_title: feat: batch categorical dedup — single call + primary/secondary/remove
pr_description: Combines the best of PR #372 and PR #373: Single batch call** from PR #373 (18x fewer LLM calls, 1.5-6x faster) Categorical primary/secondary/remove** from PR #372 (proven deduplication) Prompt fixes** from iter 49 synthesis (B2, B3, S1) Robustness guards** from iter 50 assessment (duplicate lever_id, minimum count) Supersedes PR #372 and PR #373.
